name: Khandera Art Space
tagline: Radical collaborative art, performative codes, and venue-less media revolutions.
heroSubtitle: Radical art as spatial insurgency and collective ritual.

home.projectsIntro: Each project is a volatile intervention - a snapshot from our ongoing anti-institutional archive.
home.manifestoExcerpt: We are not a gallery. We are a catalyst. We gather in ruins of matter and signal with ephemeral code that refuses the status quo.
